CHAPTER TWO: SETTING THE TARGET

1
Divya was already good at handling people at work.
People always came to me for help.
2
But the next step needed an MBA she did not have.
How do I lead HR for real?
3
Then she found an online MBA in Human Resource Management.
I can grow without quitting my job!
4
Divya enrolled and began leading with confidence.
From capable to qualified!

Why An MBA In Human Resource Management
